gotchas.title: Plaintext Secrets in Shell Config
gotchas.pattern: Secrets stored as 'set -x' in config.fish are world-readable to any process running as the user, including backups, screen sharing, and accidentally catting the file.
symptoms: API keys or tokens visible in shell configuration files
Secrets appearing in shell history or environment snapshots
Risk of accidental exposure during live sessions
gotchas.mitigation: Use iao encrypted secrets store (age + keyring). Remove plaintext 'set -x' lines and replace with 'iao secret export --fish | source'.
gotchas.context: Added in iao 0.1.2 W3 during secrets architecture overhaul.

gotchas.title: Flat-layout Python package shadows repo name
gotchas.pattern: A Python package at repo_root/pkg/pkg/ creates ambiguous imports and confusing directory navigation.
symptoms: cd iao/iao is a valid command
Import tooling confused about which iao/ is the package
Editable installs resolve wrong directory
gotchas.mitigation: Use src-layout from project start; refactor early if inherited. iao 0.1.3 W2 migrated iao/iao/ to iao/src/iao/.
gotchas.context: Added in iao 0.1.3 W2 during src-layout refactor.

gotchas.title: Existence-only acceptance criteria mask quality failures
gotchas.pattern: Success criteria that check only whether a file exists allow stubs and empty artifacts to pass quality gates.
symptoms: Bundle at 3.2 KB passes post-flight despite reference being 600 KB
Artifacts contain only headers and no substantive content
Quality regressions invisible to automation
gotchas.mitigation: Every success criterion must include a content check, not just an existence check. iao 0.1.3 W3 added bundle quality gates enforcing minimum size and section completeness.
gotchas.context: Added in iao 0.1.3 W3. Root cause: iao 0.1.2 W7 retrospective.

gotchas.title: README falls behind reality without enforcement
gotchas.pattern: README not updated during iterations, creating drift between documentation and actual package state.
symptoms: README references old version numbers or missing features
New subpackages and CLI commands undocumented
README component count does not match actual filesystem
gotchas.mitigation: Add post-flight check that verifies README.mtime > iteration_start. iao 0.1.3 W6 added readme_current check.
gotchas.context: Added in iao 0.1.3 W6.

gotchas.title: Four-octet versioning drift from kjtcom pattern-match
gotchas.pattern: iao versioning is locked to X.Y.Z three octets. kjtcom uses X.Y.Z.W because kjtcom Z is semantic. pattern-matching from kjtcom causes version drift.
symptoms: Iteration versions appearing as 0.1.3.1 or 0.1.4.0
Inconsistent metadata across pyproject.toml, VERSION, and .iao.json
Post-flight validation failures on version strings
gotchas.mitigation: Strictly adhere to three-octet X.Y.Z format. Use Regex validator in src/iao/config.py to enforce at iteration close.
gotchas.context: Added in iao 0.1.4 W1.7 resolution of 0.1.3 planning drift.

gotchas.title: Heredocs break agents
gotchas.pattern: `printf` only. Never `<<EOF`.
symptoms: Migrated from kjtcom
gotchas.mitigation: `printf` only. Never `<<EOF`.
gotchas.context: Migrated from kjtcom G1 in iao 0.1.4 W3.

gotchas.title: Gemini runs bash by default
gotchas.pattern: Wrap fish-specific commands: `fish -c "your command"`. Bash works for general commands.
symptoms: Migrated from kjtcom
gotchas.mitigation: Wrap fish-specific commands: `fish -c "your command"`. Bash works for general commands.
gotchas.context: Migrated from kjtcom G19 in iao 0.1.4 W3.

gotchas.title: TripleDB schema drift during migration
gotchas.pattern: Inspect actual Firestore data before any schema migration; verify field consistency across all documents
symptoms: Migrated from kjtcom
gotchas.mitigation: Inspect actual Firestore data before any schema migration; verify field consistency across all documents
gotchas.context: Migrated from kjtcom G31 in iao 0.1.4 W3.

gotchas.title: Detail panel provider not accessible at all viewport sizes
gotchas.pattern: Ensure DetailPanel NotifierProvider is always in widget tree at all viewport sizes
symptoms: Migrated from kjtcom
gotchas.mitigation: Ensure DetailPanel NotifierProvider is always in widget tree at all viewport sizes
gotchas.context: Migrated from kjtcom G39 in iao 0.1.4 W3.

gotchas.title: Widget rebuild triggers event handlers multiple times
gotchas.pattern: Added deduplication logic and guard flags to prevent handler re-execution
symptoms: Migrated from kjtcom
gotchas.mitigation: Added deduplication logic and guard flags to prevent handler re-execution
gotchas.context: Migrated from kjtcom G41 in iao 0.1.4 W3.

gotchas.title: TripleDB results displaying show names in title case
gotchas.pattern: Data fix via fix_tripledb_shows_case.py (same as G37)
symptoms: Migrated from kjtcom
gotchas.mitigation: Data fix via fix_tripledb_shows_case.py (same as G37)
gotchas.context: Migrated from kjtcom G49 in iao 0.1.4 W3.

gotchas.title: Self-grading bias accepted as Tier-1
gotchas.pattern: ADR-015 hard cap + Pattern 20.
symptoms: Migrated from kjtcom
gotchas.mitigation: ADR-015 hard cap + Pattern 20.
gotchas.context: Migrated from kjtcom G62 in iao 0.1.4 W3.

gotchas.title: Agent asks for permission
gotchas.pattern: Pre-flight notes-and-proceeds
symptoms: Migrated from kjtcom
gotchas.mitigation: Pre-flight notes-and-proceeds
gotchas.context: Migrated from kjtcom G71 in iao 0.1.4 W3.

gotchas.title: Evaluator dynamic baseline loads at init, misses files created mid-run
gotchas.description: The evaluator's allowed-files baseline loaded at module init, before the current run's W1 could create or rename files. Synthesis runs that referenced newly-created files were rejected as hallucinations, causing a 2-hour rejection loop in 0.1.11.
gotchas.fix: Reload baseline inside evaluate_text() on every call. ~10ms overhead, correct in the presence of mid-run file changes.

gotchas.title: Scripts emitting events should read iteration from checkpoint not env
gotchas.description: smoke_instrumentation.py logged events stamped with the previous iteration version because it read from an env var that wasn't re-exported after checkpoint bump.
gotchas.fix: Scripts that emit events must read iteration from .aho-checkpoint.json at script start.

gotchas.title: Fish set -l is invisible inside functions in the same script
gotchas.pattern: Fish functions do not inherit local variables from enclosing script scope. set -l at script level is invisible inside functions defined in the same file.
symptoms: Function reads a script-level variable and gets empty string
Loops over the variable iterate zero times with no error
CLI wrapper produces empty output despite correct logic
gotchas.mitigation: Use set -g (global) for all script-level constants consumed by functions in the same file. Never set -l for cross-function constants.
gotchas.context: Surfaced in 0.2.3 W1. bin/aho-mcp used set -l for script_version and mcp_packages. Both were invisible to mcp_list, mcp_doctor, etc. Fixed in 0.2.4 W1.

gotchas.title: Canonical package lists must be registry-verified, not written from memory
gotchas.pattern: Any deliverable containing a canonical list of external packages must include a registry verification step. Lists written from agent memory are stale on arrival.
symptoms: npm install emits 404 errors for packages that moved or were archived
npm install emits deprecation warnings for superseded packages
Clone-to-deploy fails on first npm install
gotchas.mitigation: Postflight runs npm view against every entry in the canonical list. Any 404 or deprecation flips the check from OK to FAIL. See src/aho/postflight/mcp_canonical_registry_verify.py.
gotchas.context: Surfaced in 0.2.3 W1. 2 of 12 packages 404, 2 of 12 deprecated. Fixed in 0.2.4 W1+W2.

gotchas.title: OTEL span attributes must be scalars; flatten dicts via prefix expansion
gotchas.pattern: OpenTelemetry span attributes only accept scalars (bool, str, bytes, int, float) or sequences of scalars. Passing a dict silently drops the attribute and emits an error to stderr.
symptoms: Invalid type dict errors in stderr during span emission
aho.tokens attribute missing from exported spans
Token usage data lost in OTEL traces
gotchas.mitigation: Flatten dict-shaped attributes into separate scalar attributes with dotted prefix (e.g., aho.tokens.total, aho.tokens.input). Applied in logger.py set_attribute call.
gotchas.context: Surfaced in 0.2.3. qwen-client and rag/router passed {total, input, output} dicts. Fixed in 0.2.5 W7.

gotchas.title: Workstream pass requires post-install verification on target machine
gotchas.pattern: A workstream marked 'pass' that generates code without verifying the code runs on the target machine is not actually passing. Code generation is necessary but not sufficient.
symptoms: Conductor smoke test passes in CI but fails on target
Claimed deliverables exist as code but were never executed
Post-install verification discovers runtime failures
gotchas.mitigation: Every workstream that produces deployable artifacts must include a verification step that runs the artifact on the target. bin/aho-conductor smoke provides the canonical pattern: dispatch + assert file + assert spans.
gotchas.context: Surfaced in 0.2.3 W4 conductor dispatch. Qwen roleplayed deliverables, GLM rubber-stamped. Fixed in 0.2.5 W9 with real verifiable smoke test.

gotchas.title: Declared tools must be exercised
gotchas.pattern: A tool declared in the harness (installed, listed, counted) but never invoked during agent execution is declared-but-not-exercised. The declaration creates a false signal that the tool is operational.
symptoms: Dashboard shows 'ok' for tools that have never been called
MCP fleet installed for five iterations with zero invocations
Component coverage reports 'ok' based on installation, not usage
gotchas.mitigation: Smoke tests per tool (bin/aho-mcp smoke). MCP-first mandate in CLAUDE.md/GEMINI.md. Run report 'MCP Tools Invoked' section per workstream.
gotchas.context: Surfaced in 0.2.8 W1. MCP fleet installed since 0.2.3, zero invocations across 0.2.3–0.2.7. Fixed in 0.2.8 W2–W5.

gotchas.title: Declared structures must be populated
gotchas.pattern: A structure declared in one source of truth but absent from another is a drift gap. The declaration implies completeness; the absence contradicts it.
symptoms: components.yaml lists entries that don't exist in bin/aho-mcp
bin/aho-mcp lists entries that don't exist in components.yaml
server-everything present in fleet but missing from manifest for five iterations
gotchas.mitigation: mcp_sources_aligned postflight gate (src/aho/postflight/mcp_sources_aligned.py) diffs components.yaml against bin/aho-mcp on every close.
gotchas.context: Surfaced in 0.2.8 W7. server-everything was in bin/aho-mcp since 0.2.4 but never in components.yaml. Gate caught it on first run.

gotchas.title: Installed != wired: npm-global MCP packages require explicit agent configuration
gotchas.pattern: An MCP server installed globally via npm is not available to an agent until it is configured as an MCP connection in the agent's tool surface (e.g., .mcp.json for Claude Code). Installation puts the binary on PATH; wiring puts the tool in the agent's callable surface.
symptoms: ToolSearch returns zero matches for installed MCP servers
Agent falls back to bash for work an MCP tool should handle
Dashboard reports 'ok' (npm-installed) while agent reports [INSTALLED-NOT-WIRED]
gotchas.mitigation: Project-level .mcp.json at repo root registers servers as MCP connections. First Actions Checklist step 5 verifies tool surface on session start. [INSTALLED-NOT-WIRED] tag convention in CLAUDE.md/GEMINI.md.
gotchas.context: Surfaced in 0.2.8 W1. All 9 servers installed since 0.2.3 but none wired in Claude Code. Fixed in 0.2.8 W2.5.

gotchas.title: Enabled != started: systemd user services require explicit start after enable
gotchas.pattern: systemctl --user enable sets a service to start on next boot/login but does not start it immediately. A service that is enabled but never started will appear as 'inactive (dead)' with zero journal entries.
symptoms: Dashboard daemon health card shows red for an enabled service
journalctl shows '-- No entries --' for the service
Service is enabled (verified by is-enabled) but never ran
gotchas.mitigation: bin/aho-systemd install now runs both enable and start for all daemons. Pattern: enable + start + verify running.
gotchas.context: Surfaced in 0.2.8 W8. harness-watcher was enabled in 0.2.5 W5 but never started. Fixed in 0.2.8 W8.

gotchas.title: Stale __pycache__ causes silent daemon failure
gotchas.pattern: Daemon starts, reports active, memory/tasks suggest it's not actually running new code. /status, /ws commands silently drop or behave unexpectedly.
symptoms: Daemon reports active but serves stale behavior
__pycache__/*.pyc compiled against older .py files loaded on import
Code changes appear to have no effect after daemon restart
gotchas.mitigation: find src/aho -type d -name __pycache__ -exec rm -rf {} + before daemon restart after any src/aho/**/*.py change.
gotchas.context: Surfaced in 0.2.11 W2 forensic. Telegram daemon served stale workstream_events.py after W2 code changes.
gotchas.status: mitigation documented, no code fix (purge is manual)

gotchas.title: Daemon code change requires restart contract
gotchas.pattern: Code changes to daemon-referenced modules don't take effect until daemons are restarted. aho-openclaw and aho-telegram load code at start, do not reload dynamically.
symptoms: Modified function behavior not observed after pip install -e .
Daemon continues to serve old logic until systemctl --user restart
Test suite passes but live daemon uses stale code
gotchas.mitigation: Any workstream touching src/aho/agents/openclaw.py, src/aho/telegram/*.py, src/aho/workstream_events.py, src/aho/cli.py, or imports thereof MUST restart both daemons. Verify via daemon_healthy() AcceptanceCheck.
gotchas.context: Surfaced in 0.2.11 W2 forensic. Formalized as contract for all future workstreams.

gotchas.title: Session-locked kills inbound thread silently
gotchas.pattern: aho-telegram reports active, /status (notifications socket) works, but /ws commands and free-text messages get no response.
symptoms: Telegram bot responds to nothing despite systemd showing active
Outbound notifications (workstream_complete) still delivered
Inbound polling thread dead, listener socket unaffected
gotchas.mitigation: Fix candidates (not executed in 0.2.11): (a) auto-unlock via kernel keyring cache, (b) emit health event on thread death for harness-watcher, (c) retry-with-backoff on get_secret(). Tracked for 0.2.12 inbound-thread-resilience workstream.
gotchas.context: Surfaced in 0.2.11 W2 forensic. Secret session locked at daemon startup kills inbound polling thread via RuntimeError.

gotchas.title: Agent guidance can introduce canonical drift
gotchas.pattern: Planner-produced artifacts reference fabricated canonical content (counts, names, lists). Drift propagates across iteration artifacts.
symptoms: Design doc §5 lists 10 pillars when canonical is 11
Pillar names/descriptions differ from README source of truth
Downstream artifacts (plan, bundle) inherit fabricated content
gotchas.mitigation: Planner MUST read canonical source (README, ADR, pattern doc) before producing artifacts that reference canonical content. Quote verbatim into decisions.md in W0 so downstream artifacts pull from verified source, not planner memory. Count-based gates (pillars_present, component count) catch drift after artifacts are written — prevention is at W0, detection is at postflight.
gotchas.context: 0.2.11 W6 — planner (Claude chat) produced design doc §5 with fabricated 10-pillar list when canonical is 11. Gate caught drift at W6. Resolved via W6-patch.

gotchas.title: Orphan process survives service restart
gotchas.pattern: systemd service restart completes, daemon_healthy() returns true, but stale terminal-launched process continues writing to old paths/sockets with stale code.
symptoms: Old event log path recreated after migration
Duplicate events from two processes writing same event type
fuser on migrated paths returns non-systemd PIDs
gotchas.mitigation: Pre-migration process census: ps aux | grep -E 'aho|telegram|openclaw|nemoclaw' | grep -v grep. Any non-systemd aho process must be killed before migration. Verification: fuser on migrated paths returns empty.
gotchas.context: Surfaced in 0.2.11 W7. Terminal-launched telegram process (PID from 06:55) survived systemctl restart, wrote heartbeats to old data/ path.

gotchas.title: Service unit files hardcode paths that bypass code resolution
gotchas.pattern: Code-level path resolution is correct but service continues using old path because systemd unit ExecStart passes path as CLI argument.
symptoms: Daemon writes to correct path when tested manually but wrong path under systemd
harness-watcher --watch argument points to old data/ path
daemon-reload required after unit file edit
gotchas.mitigation: Service unit files MUST NOT pass paths as args when code can resolve via XDG helpers. If path must be in unit file (e.g., --watch), regenerate unit at install time from event_log_path(). Lint candidate for W18.
gotchas.context: Surfaced in 0.2.11 W7. aho-harness-watcher.service had hardcoded data/aho_event_log.jsonl path.

gotchas.title: Daemon restart is not migration verification
gotchas.pattern: daemon_healthy() returns true, services restarted, but old paths still accessed. Positive assertion (services healthy) does not cover negative assertion (no stray processes on old paths).
symptoms: All daemon_healthy() checks pass but old file recreated within 30s
Process census reveals non-systemd orphan processes
Migration considered complete when it is not
gotchas.mitigation: Add migration-verify step combining process census + fuser on old paths + lsof on old sockets. Track as aho migration verify CLI for 0.2.12.
gotchas.context: Surfaced in 0.2.11 W7. Three separate rounds of restart needed because each round revealed a new orphan source.

gotchas.title: Planner-executor bias consumes council capacity
gotchas.pattern: Planner defaults prompts to 'you are claude-code executing X' without querying council state. Executor carries work intended for local free fleet. Pillar 1 (delegate everything delegable) becomes aspirational rather than operational. Pillar 8 (delegate ratio) cannot be measured because nothing is delegated.
symptoms: All workstreams executed by claude-code, zero by council agents
Schema v3 agents_involved always shows single executor
ad_hoc_forensics_minutes high on work local models could handle
Pillar 8 cost delta unmeasurable — no baseline for comparison
gotchas.mitigation: Before drafting workstream prompts, planner must query aho council status (0.2.12 deliverable) to see operational agents + dispatch surfaces. Route tasks to council members by capability, not convenience. Schema v3 efficacy tracking measures delegate ratio per workstream; iteration retrospective checks trend against Pillar 8.
gotchas.context: Surfaced in 0.2.11 W9 close. 11 workstreams executed entirely by claude-code. Persona 3 validation (W9-W14) would have validated persona 3 for claude-code, not for the council architecture aho claims to be. Triggered strategic rescope: 0.2.12 becomes council-activation iteration.
